sessionStart.prompt: Ensure the Roslyn language server is running for this workspace by using the roslyn-start skill. Detect the .sln/.csproj (ask me to choose if there are several), install Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.LanguageServer via dotnet if it is missing, then start it. If it is already running, stay silent and do nothing.

postToolUse.bash: test -f CSharpLintHook.dll && dotnet CSharpLintHook.dll hook || true
postToolUse.powershell: if (Test-Path CSharpLintHook.dll) { dotnet CSharpLintHook.dll hook }; exit 0
